rulings.Case Title: TED FELDMAN VS. DORIS KOBUCHI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 24, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANTs DORIS KOBUCHI, ANNA MCCARTHY, SHIRLEY FONG and JEAN FONG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Demurrer is brought by Kobuchi, McCarthy, Shirley Fong and Jean Fong identified as the "beneficiaries of the Trust." (Demurrer 4:11). Moving parties do not purport to be Doe 1, as trustee of the Trust. Demurrer to all causes of action alleged against Doe1 only (1, 2, 6 and 7) is OVERRULED. Demurrer to 3rd cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. Demurrer to 4th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege "actual disruption of the relationship" caused by intentional acts of moving defendants. Demurer to the 5th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts re: duty and breach of duty as to moving defendants. = (501/REQ)
